purpose: Define which role families must be assignable per service profile without turning role families into new departments.
orchestration_binding_rules: orchestration/service.map.yaml must declare assigned_roles for the current service.
orchestration/service.map.yaml must declare a primary_owner_role and at least one review role.
Role assignment may add business roles such as finance and marketing when the service model requires them.
Token optimization is a cross-cutting role and must be modeled as a role, not as a department.
hard_rules: Departments remain state-machine stages and must not be expanded to mirror every business function.
A service may assign extra roles, but required profile roles must remain present.
Central governance may validate role coverage, but service-local orchestration owns day-to-day assignment.
